Independent destination rehash fingerprint is 5e1bd31cbf1697f3e2dbe41dfe7c0e96f9064bda001739d5e05393f0d7dac401. Evidence: qa/reports/reference_benchmark_materialization_20260716.json.

Missing identity/partition fails closed. Accepted builds bind the exact 2,500-row benchmark fingerprint c577bbd85760705fd48d86d7668f2a4190832436cfae150afe7049258eb1635e; the training launcher independently refuses absent/failed/drifted receipts. 34 focused and 1,758 full tests pass. Body-part tags are required when available. Every candidate/root declares unlabeled_reference_corpus, truth_authority=none, training_eligible=false, and independent certification required. Live left-profile seated/crouched duo left_hand/finger_merge probe returned three part_hand_fingers/profile references. 21 focused and 1,759 full tests pass. Evidence: qa/reports/reference_retrieval_acquisition_context_20260716.json.

### MF-P9-15 — Near-perfect selective autonomy with minimal binary review (spec: 23 §§2–3,9–12; docs 20–22)

- ☐ **MF-P9-15.01** -- Make near-perfect selective autonomy the product acceptance target: ordinary mIoU ≥0.95, boundary-F1 ≥0.90, hard anatomy mIoU ≥0.85 · Verify: blinded real human-anchor holdout report meets each metric without bucket collapse · Blocked by: frozen real human-anchor holdout and eligible challengers

- 🟨 **MF-P9-15.02** -- 80% **[HARD BLOCKER]** -- Require zero cross-instance bleed, zero left/right swaps, and 100% format integrity · Verify: any seeded or audited violation blocks/revokes · Blocked by: existing QA/certification paths · HARD BLOCKER
    - Note (2026-07-16T03:11:13+00:00, codex): Zero bleed/swap and strict-format fail-closed contracts and seeded tests exist; production audit evidence across the final system remains.
- ☐ **MF-P9-15.03** -- Sustain zero-touch fraction ≥0.95, routine human touch ≤0.05, and manual pixel-edit fraction ≤0.01 · Verify: measured production report, not review-time proxy · Blocked by: end-to-end eligible corpus
    - Note (2026-07-16T03:11:15+00:00, codex): Labor targets are frozen; zero-touch >=0.95 and manual pixel-edit <=0.01 require measured production evidence, not a proxy.

- ☑ **MF-P9-15.05** -- Record decisions in an idempotent hash-chained ledger · Verify: tamper, replay, and conflicting-decision fixtures fail closed · Blocked by: MF-P9-15.04
    - Evidence: Binary decisions persist to an idempotent SHA-256 hash-chained ledger; tamper, replay, and conflicting-decision tests pass.
- ☑ **MF-P9-15.06** -- On approve, seal prepared human-anchor truth or record autonomous audit agreement without changing authority · Verify: approval never invents human gold · Blocked by: MF-P9-15.04, MF-P9-15.05

### Phase Exit Gate

- ☐ **MF-P9-EXIT** -- Qualified external labels and DAZ improve untouched real human-anchor results; reference leakage is zero; selective autonomy meets the quality/labor targets; DAZ survives the seven-day soak and remains reversible · Verify: signed P9 evidence bundle plus full regression, real holdout ablations, rollback, and tracker validation pass · Blocked by: every MF-P9 item
